creator: pete@nomadlogic.org
text:
I have an HP Elitebook 840 that I am testing 10.1-STABLE on.  I have burned the latest snapshot file:
FreeBSD-10.1-STABLE-amd64-20150302-r279507-uefi-mini-memstick.img

I have set the system BIOS to disable non-UEFI compatibility and am able to boot off of USB drive.  The EFI loader loads up OK, and I am able to enter the OK prompt and list modules etc.

When I exit by issuing the "boot" command the system hangs at:

 [37:44mBooting... [0m
Start @ 0xffffffff802dbc60 ...


At this point the keyboard is un-responsive (caps lock does not light up when pressed) and system does not progress.

Please let me know if additional debug info is required.
